CustomField.description: Logic to decide if a PTS is valid, produces text Valid / Invalid, No PTS
CustomField.formula: IF(sirenum__PTS_AC_Expiry_Date__c > TODAY() && sirenum__PTS_DCCR_Expiry_Date__c > TODAY(), "PTS AC/DCCR Valid", IF(sirenum__PTS_AC_Expiry_Date__c > TODAY(), "PTS AC Valid", IF(sirenum__PTS_DCCR_Expiry_Date__c > TODAY(), "PTS DCCR Valid", IF(NOT(ISNULL(sirenum__PTS_AC_Expiry_Date__c)) || NOT(ISNULL(sirenum__PTS_DCCR_Expiry_Date__c)), "Invalid", "N/A"))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If person has no card will show "N/A". IF card expired will show "Invalid". otherwise shows Says the name of the card and "Valid"
CustomField.label: PTS Audit
